summary: Comprehensive testing of new AI PDI Generator module (backend + frontend). 14/14 backend pytest tests pass. Frontend UI validates: sidebar nav, 3 tabs (Generate/Reports/Library), dispatch auto-match, manual template search, generate button flow with preview dialog, reports listing with search/preview/regenerate/delete, template library (120 templates) with view/edit, Settings > Masters panel with PDI Inspectors/Approvers add-delete. Regression: existing nav (Packing, Reports, Master Dispatch group) still works. Modules API no longer contains 'dqms'; 'pdi' active.
critical_code_review_comments: pdi_routes.py update_template line 107: `[r if isinstance(r, dict) else r for r in updates['rows']]` is a no-op — trivial, but consider removing or coercing pydantic row models via .model_dump().

generate_report uses payload.lot_size as string (Pydantic string_type). If user leaves Lot Size blank in UI, Pydantic still accepts empty string; consider min-length validation for lot_no since it is a search/filter key.

Reports list endpoint pops 'observations' from response — good — but PdiReport.from_mongo likely still exposes 'pdf_path' before pop. Confirm no filesystem paths leak in serialized responses (currently popped explicitly, OK).
Delete endpoint removes PDF from disk but does not soft-delete/archive; historical/audit trail for regulatory concerns worth considering.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of targeted testids present and interactive

seed_data_creation: Created & cleaned up TEST_INSP1/TEST_APR1 masters, TEST_LOT_1/TEST_LOT_DEL reports (TEST_LOT_DEL deleted; TEST_LOT_1 remains in history). Regenerated existing report once during UI test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth returns {token, user} (not access_token). Login form has no name attrs; use data-testid='login-username-input' and 'login-password-input'. Settings Masters is under Masters tab (role=tab). PdiGenerateInput requires lot_size as STRING not int. Sidebar nav-master-dispatch-list does not exist; use the collapsible 'Master Dispatch' group with sub-items nav-dispatch-list etc. PDI generate flow requires template selected + inspector + approver + lot_no (button disabled otherwise).
